nodes.label: run_pipeline
nodes.rationale: Main pipeline loop capped at 3 cycles. Runs SQL_PLAN -> SECURITY CHECK -> VALIDATE -> EXECUTE, with LEARN on failure and ANSWER on success. Security gates run before SQL execution so a blocked query is never executed.

nodes.label: json_extract.py
nodes.rationale: 7-priority extraction. Mutation tools (write/delete) take priority over reads to avoid spurious tool calls — this ordering is load-bearing.

nodes.label: llm.py
nodes.rationale: Provider prefix determines routing tier: anthropic/ -> Anthropic SDK; openrouter/ -> OpenRouter; ollama/ or bare name -> local Ollama. Transient errors retry with backoff.

nodes.label: scripts/propose_optimizations.py
nodes.rationale: Synthesizers receive existing rules/prompts to prevent duplicate generation. _existing_* helpers must be preserved. All output channels require human review before activation — nothing activates automatically.

nodes.label: data/rules/*.yaml
nodes.rationale: Only rows with verified: true are loaded into the pipeline.

nodes.label: data/security/*.yaml
nodes.rationale: Security gates (regex pattern or named check); verified: true to activate. Run before SQL execution.

nodes.label: .eval_optimizations_processed
nodes.rationale: Tracks processed entries by SHA-256 hash of (channel|task_text|raw_rec) to prevent duplicate optimization generation across runs.

nodes.label: LLM routing strategy
nodes.rationale: Provider prefix in MODEL env var determines which SDK is used: anthropic/ -> Anthropic SDK, openrouter/ -> OpenRouter, ollama/ or bare name -> local Ollama.

nodes.label: optimization output channels
nodes.rationale: Three channels: rule_optimization -> data/rules/sql-NNN.yaml, security_optimization -> data/security/sec-NNN.yaml, prompt_optimization -> data/prompts/optimized/. All require human review (verified: true or manual copy) before activation.

nodes.label: pipeline execution phases
nodes.rationale: SQL_PLAN, SECURITY CHECK, VALIDATE, EXECUTE phases per cycle. On failure: LEARN phase extracts a rule and retries. On success: ANSWER phase synthesizes response.

nodes.label: deduplication mechanism
nodes.rationale: SHA-256 hash of (channel|task_text|raw_rec) stored in data/.eval_optimizations_processed. In --dry-run mode skipped entries are NOT added to the processed set — preview is truly non-destructive.

nodes.label: synthesizer behavior
nodes.rationale: Each channel calls agent.llm.call_llm_raw with existing content injected into system prompt (_existing_rules_text, _existing_security_text, _existing_prompts_text) to prevent duplicates. LLM returns null if recommendation already covered. _next_num() scans target dir for next sequential ID.

nodes.label: adding a new optimization channel
nodes.rationale: Requires: synthesizer function _synthesize_<channel>(), writer function _write_<channel>(), loop block in main(), and unique dedup hash channel string differing from 'rule', 'security', 'prompt'.

nodes.label: MODEL_EVALUATOR env var
nodes.rationale: MODEL_EVALUATOR specifies the LLM used for synthesis in propose_optimizations.py. Set in .env, same model as the main MODEL var.

nodes.label: Three optimization channels (rule, security, prompt)
nodes.rationale: propose_optimizations.py synthesizes eval_log.jsonl entries into candidate files via three channels: SQL rules, security gates, prompt patches. Each writes to a separate directory with verified:false requiring manual activation.

nodes.label: Pipeline Phase Execution Order
nodes.rationale: Per cycle (up to 3): RESOLVE → SQL_PLAN → AGENTS.MD refs check → SECURITY → SCHEMA → VALIDATE → EXECUTE → ANSWER → LEARN (on failure). RESOLVE runs first to populate confirmed_values before schema_gate checks unverified literals.

nodes.label: JSON extraction mutation-first priority
nodes.rationale: json_extract.py priority is load-bearing: mutation tools (write/delete) take priority over reads to avoid spurious tool calls.

nodes.label: Session rules cap (max 3)
nodes.rationale: _run_learn keeps only the last 3 session rules (session_rules[-3:]) to prevent unbounded context growth.

nodes.label: RESOLVE query security constraint
nodes.rationale: RESOLVE queries must contain LIKE or DISTINCT (ILIKE accepted but unsupported by SQLite); DDL/DML blocked. Ensures discovery queries are read-only and targeted.

nodes.label: loop.py / dispatch.py removed
nodes.rationale: loop.py and dispatch.py no longer exist — replaced by pipeline.py and llm.py. agent/CLAUDE.md is noted as outdated in root CLAUDE.md.

nodes.label: Optimization Pipeline Design
nodes.rationale: Three-channel pipeline (rule/security/prompt) each flows: flatten → content-hash dedup → LLM cluster → synthesize → contradiction-check → harness validate → write. Candidates written with verified:false; nothing activates automatically. Prevents duplicates by injecting existing content into LLM synthesizer prompts. call_llm_raw_cluster is an intentional module-level alias to call_llm_raw, exposed specifically to allow test patching without affecting synthesizer calls.

nodes.label: Validation Gate Design
nodes.rationale: Before writing any candidate file, the script re-runs the originating task through the BitGN harness with the recommendation injected. A candidate is written only if validation_score >= original_score. If no baseline score exists in logs/, candidate is written with a warning. If the task is not found in the trial set, the candidate is skipped entirely.
